---
title: "My first R Markdown"
author: "Lori Ortega"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

# Header level 1

**BOLD**

## Header level 2

*Italics* 

### These hashmarks change the size of the font 

Now I will prepare to stage, commit and push this document.


## Including Plots

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
